name: platform-console
description: Admin Console for Platform Engineering: a single front door (/admin catalog + /orchestrate orchestrator layer) over 8 AI agents and a specialist/foundational platform layer (Application, Data, AI, Infrastructure). Platforms expose stubbed connectors with dummy data, the orchestrator narrates cross-layer calls (AI -> Data -> Infra), and a self-service mode lets the AI platform use paved-road defaults to reduce infra-team dependency.
